resources.string: Shows your Wi-Fi IP and network at a glance

Pino\'s widget keeps your phone\'s local IP and Wi-Fi network right on your home screen — perfect for grabbing that IP in a flash while you\'re wiring things up over ADB.\n\nTo add it: long-press your home screen → Widgets → Pino.
Keeps the Wi-Fi widget up to date in the background

Pino uses this service to stay active in the background so its home screen widget can keep showing your current Wi-Fi IP address and network name without delay.\n\nIt does not read your screen, capture what you do, or interact with other apps. It only checks your Wi-Fi connection every few seconds and refreshes the widget when the IP address or network changes.
